nebty_names.translation: Whose might is great, whose heart is beneficial with all the Gods, who is the savior of mankind

nebty_names.translation: The one great of strength, who has established the Two Lands and made Ta-mery perfect (by) being efficacious before the gods

horus_names.translation: Distinguished in the sanctuary, the twin brother of the living Apis bull upon their birth stone
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 27b1

nebty_names.translation: Truly, whose father enthroned him

golden_horus_names.translation: The one great of strength, a possessor of Sed festivals like Ptah Tatenen, the father of the gods, and a sovereign like Ra
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 27b1

throne_names.translation: Heir of the two gods who has emerged, chosen by Ptah-Khepri, who carried out Maat for Amun-Ra
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 27b2

throne_names.translation: Heir of the two gods who has emerged, chosen by Ptah-Khepri, who carried out Maat for Amun-Ra
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 23d

throne_names.name: Iwa en netjerwy peru setep en Ptah Kheperi ir Maat (en) Amun-Ra
throne_names.translation: Heir of the two gods who has emerged, chosen by Ptah-Khepri, who carried out Maat for Amun-Ra
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, Text IV, 170α

throne_names.name: Iwa en netjerwy peru setep en Ptah ir Maat (en) Amun-Ra
throne_names.translation: Heir of the two gods who has emerged, chosen by Ptah, who carried out Maat for Amun-Ra
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 27a

birth_names.name: Ptolemys, _ankh djet mery Ptah_
birth_names.translation: Ptolemaios, living forever, beloved of Ptah
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 27b2

prenomen: Iwa en netjerwy perwy setep en Ptah ir Maat Ra sekhem ankh en Amun

horus_names.name: Hunu, hekentu em ankhef her neset itef, mar sepu, djeser meskhauef hena hapu ankh
horus_names.translation: The youthful one, about whose life on his father’s throne one is joyful, successful of deeds, and whose appearances with the living Apis bull are sacred
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 39b

horus_names.name: Hunu hekentu her nesut itef tit djeser net nesu netjeru setep en Amundjesef
horus_names.translation: The youthful one, about whose father’s throne one is joyful, the sacred image of the king of the gods, chosen by Atum himself
sources: Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 323 (LVIII C)
Budge, _The decree of Memphis and Canopus_, I, 137 (A3)

horus_names.name: Hunu herytep pedjet 9 sa Usir mes en Aset shesep enef nesyt Ra em a itef
horus_names.translation: The youthful one, leader of the Nine Bows, the son of Osiris, whom Isis has borne, who has received for himself the kingship of Ra from his father’s hand
sources: Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 323 (LVIII D)
Budge, _The decree of Memphis and Canopus_, I, 137 (A4)

nebty_names.name: Seheru ib tawy
nebty_names.translation: Who has pleased the Two Lands
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 37c

nebty_names.translation: Who has pleased the Two Lands
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 36+39b

golden_horus_names.translation: The one great of strength, a possessor of Sed festivals like his father Ptah Tatenen, the father of the gods, and a sovereign like Ra
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 37c

throne_names.name: Iwa en netjerwy perwy setep en Ptah ir Maat Ra sekhem ankh en Amun
throne_names.translation: Heir of the two gods, chosen by Ptah, who has accomplished the Maat (of?) Ra, the living image of Amun
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 37c

birth_names.name: Ptolemys, _ankh djet mery Ptah_
birth_names.translation: Ptolemaios, living forever, beloved of Ptah
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 36d

birth_names.name: Ptolemys, _ankh djet mery Ptah_
birth_names.translation: Ptolemaios, living forever, beloved of Ptah
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 37c

prenomen: Iwa netjer menekh netjeret meret mutes nedjet setep en Ptah iri maat Ra sekhem ankh Amun

horus_names.name: Djoser mesut hena hapu ankh, netjeri kheperu, sensen mesekhen net sa Aset
horus_names.translation: Distinguished through his birth together with the living Apis, godlike at conception, twin in his birthplace with the son of Isis
sources: deRouge, _Inscriptions et notices recueillies a Edfou_, I, plate XLIII

horus_names.name: Ka nakht ity pesedj em tameri mi hapu ankh, redj enef habu-sed ashau weru mi Ptah-Tatenen it netjeru
horus_names.translation: The strong bull and sovereign
sources: who shines in Ta-mery like the living Apis bull, whom has been given many Sed festivals like Ptah Ta-tjenen, and father of the gods
Gauthier, _Le livre des Rois d'Egypte_, IV, 359 (XLV)

nebty_names.name: Sekha su mutef her nesut itef iti tawy em Maat-kheru
nebty_names.translation: The one whose mother placed on the throne of his father, who has siezed the inheritance of the Two Lands in justification
sources: Daressy, _Note sur des bas-reliefs du temple de Deir el-Médineh_, BIFAO 6, 73

nebty_names.name: Wer pehty khenti-she neheh semen hepu mi Djehuti-aa
nebty_names.translation: Whose might is great, who is pleased over eternity, who determines the laws like the great god Thoth
sources: Second reign, occurs in several places in the Temple of Edfu
Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 359 (XLV B)

nebty_names.name: Wer pehty sekhem wadj-wer iti iwa tawy em Maat-kheru, menkh-ib kher netjeru remetju
nebty_names.translation: Whose might is great, who has power over the sea, who is conquering his inheritance in the Two Lands in triumph, who is beneficient in the hearts for Gods and men
sources: Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 358 (XLII A)

golden_horus_names.name: Neb ta mery, heqaef em haau neb habu-sed mi Tatenen it netjeru nesut ity semen hepu mi Djehuti-aa
golden_horus_names.translation: Lord of Egypt who rules in joy, the lord of the Sed festival like Ptah-Tatenen, king of the Gods, who determines the laws like the great god Thoth
sources: Daressy, _Note sur des bas-reliefs du temple de Deir el-Médineh_, BIFAO 6, 73

golden_horus_names.name: Shesep ta mery, heqaef em haau, neb habu-sed ashau weru mi itef Ptah-Tatenen semsu netjeru, shesepenef nesyt en Ra em qenu nekhet
golden_horus_names.translation: Who, seizing Egypt, rules in joy, the lord of many great Sed festivals like his father Ptah-Tatenen, the oldest of the Gods

throne_names.name: Iwa netjer menekh netjeret meret mutes nedjet setep en Ptah iri maat Ra sekhem ankh Amun
throne_names.translation: The heir of the Beneficient God and the Goddess who loves her mother and who saves, the chosen of Ptah, who brings forth the order of Ra, the living image of Amun
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 42c

throne_names.name: Iwa netjer menekh netjeret meret mutes nedjet setep en Ptah, ir Maat Ra sekhem ankh Amun
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, Text IV, 108α

throne_names.name: Iwa netjer menekh netjeret Meret mutes nedjet setep en Ptah, iri Maat Ra sekhem ankh Amun
sources: Daressy, _Note sur des bas-reliefs du temple de Deir el-Médineh_, BIFAO 6, 72
Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 360 (XLVIII A)

throne_names.name: Iwa aanetjeru menekhu setep en Ptah iri Maat Ra sekhem ankh Amun
sources: Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 358 (XLII A)

birth_names.name: Ptolemys, _ankh djet mery Ptah_
birth_names.translation: Ptolemaios, living forever, beloved of Ptah
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 42c

prenomen: Iwa netjer menekh en etjeret menkhet sat Ra setep en Ptah ir Maat Ra senen ankh en Amun
nomen: Ptolmys djed enef Ileksentres _ankh djet mery Ptah_

horus_names.name: netjeri em khet, khnum. en su hapu ankh her meskhen(et), hunu nefer, bener merut, sekha.en su mut.ef her neset it.ef, tjema-a hui khasut, iti em sekhem.ef mi ra pesedj.ef em akhet
horus_names.transliteration: nṯri m ẖt ẖnm.n s(w) ḥpw-Ꜥnḫ ḥr msḫnti ḥwn nfr bnr mrwt sḫꜤi.n sw-mwt.f ḥr nst it.f ṯmꜢ-Ꜥ ḥwꞽ ḫꜢswt iṯi m sḫm.f mi rꜤ psḏ.f m Ꜣḫt
horus_names.translation: The divine one in the sanctuary, whom the living Apis bull has united with the birth-stool, the perfect youth sweet of love, whom his mother enthroned on his father’s throne, the sturdy-armed one who has struck down foreign countries and seized with his power like Ra when he shines in the horizon.
sources: Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 386 (LXXXVII A)
Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, Text IV, 68

nebty_names.name: Seher tawy ka nakht sekhem neneh
nebty_names.translation: Who pleases the Two Lands, the strong bull, eternal power
sources: Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 386 (LXXXVII B)
Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, Text IV, 68

golden_horus_names.name: Aa ib mery netjeru, ity Baqet, heqa wadjty aqef Ta-mery em hotep
golden_horus_names.translation: The great-hearted one who is beloved of the Gods, Master of Baqet and ruler of the two crowns, when he enters The Beloved Land in peace
sources: Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 386 (LXXXVII C)
Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, Text IV, 68

throne_names.name: Iwa netjer menekh en etjeret menkhet sat Ra setep en Ptah ir Maat Ra senen ankh en Amun
throne_names.translation: Heir of the potent god and of the potent goddess, the daughter of Ra , chosen by Ptah, who has accomplished the Maat of Ra, the living likeness of Amun
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 44b

birth_names.name: Ptolmys djed enef Ileksentres _ankh djet mery Ptah_
birth_names.transliteration: ptwlmꞽs ḏd n.f Ꜥlksntrs Ꜥnḫ-ḏt mrꞽ-ptḥ

prenomen: Iwa en pa netjer nehem setep en Ptah ir Maat en Ra Sekhem ankh Imen

horus_names.name: Hunu nefer, bener-merut, tjeni su nebty rekhyet hena kaf, dua enef Khnum, shepes er shesep en.ef kha em nesu, sensen en sehnu em haaw mi nedjet itef tjehen mesut her neset itef mi hor ka nakht, ity pesedj em ta-mery mi Hapu ankh, redi enef hebu-sed ashau weru mi Ptah-Tatenen it netjeru
horus_names.transliteration: ḥwnw-nfr bnr-mrwt ṯnꞽ-sw-nbt-rḫyt-ḥnꜤ-kꜢ.f dwꜢ.n.f-ḫnmw-šps-r-šzp-n.f-ḫꜤ(t)-m-nsw snsn.n-sḥnw-m-ḥꜤꜤw-mꞽ-Nḏ-ꞽt.f ṯḥn-msw(t)-ḥr-nst-ꞽt.f-mꞽ-ḥr-kꜢ-nḫt ꞽty-psḏ-m-tꜢmrꞽ-mꞽ-ḥpw-Ꜥnḫ rdꞽ-n.f-ḥꜢbw-sd-ꜤšꜢw-wrw-mꞽ-Ptḥ-tꜢṯnn-ꞽt-nṯrw
horus_names.translation: The perfect youth, pleasant in his popularity, whom the Two Ladies and the common folk have elevated along with his ka, who the wonderful Khnum praises so that he receives the crown of kingship, who unites himself with the works (of his father) in joy like that which his father protects, who is shining at birth on the throne of his father like Horus, the strong bull, the lord who lights up Egypt like the living Apis, to whom many great Sed festivals will be given through Ptah-Tatenen, the father of the Gods
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 49b

nebty_names.name: Wer pehty khenty she neheh semen hepu mi Djehuty aa
nebty_names.translation: The one great of strength and foremost one of the sea forever, who has established laws like the twice-great Thoth
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 52a

nebty_names.name: Wer pehty khenty she neheh nefer ib wetjes neferu mi Djehuty aa
nebty_names.translation: The one great of
sources: strength and foremost one of the sea forever, perfect of mind, who has raised perfection like the twice-great Thoth
Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 49b

golden_horus_names.name: Aa-ib ity neb qenu nakht mi sa Aset
golden_horus_names.translation: The one great of mind, the sovereign, the possessor of bravery and strength like the son of Isis
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 49a

golden_horus_names.name: Aa-ib mery netjeru baqet ity mi Ra heqa wadjety
golden_horus_names.translation: The one great of mind who is beloved of the gods of Baqet, a sovereign like Ra and ruler of the two crowns
sources: Gauthier, _Le Livre des Rois d'Égypte_, IV, 405 (XLVIII B)

throne_names.name: Iwa en pa netjer nehem setep en Ptah ir Maat en Ra Sekhem ankh Imen
throne_names.translation: The heir of the saviour god, who is the chosen of Ptah, who brings forth the order of Ra, the living image of Amun
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 49b

throne_names.name: Iwa en pa netjer nety nehem seten en Ptah ir Maat Amun-Ra
throne_names.translation: Heir of the saviour god, chosen by Ptah, who has brings forth the order of Amun-Ra
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 51a

throne_names.name: Iwa en pa netjer nehem setep en Ptah ir Maat
throne_names.translation: The heir of the saviour god, who is the chosen of Ptah, who brings forth order
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, Text IV, 170

throne_names.name: Pa netjer mery it sen Usiri hunu
throne_names.transliteration: pꜢ nṯr-mrꞽ ꞽt snt wsꞽrꞽ ḥwnw
throne_names.translation: The god who is beloved of his father and brother, the youthful Osiris

birth_names.name: Ptolemys _ankh djet mery Ptah Aset_
birth_names.translation: Ptolemaios, living forever, beloved of Ptah and Isis
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 49a

birth_names.name: Ptolemys _ankh djet mery Aset_
birth_names.translation: Ptolemaios, living forever, beloved of Isis
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 47a

horus_names.name: Weret nebet, neferu akhet seh
horus_names.translation: The great Lady of perfection, excellent in counsel
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 65a

horus_names.name: Weret, tut en ites
horus_names.translation: The great one and the (very) image of her father
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, Text IV, 4α

birth_names.name: Qliu pa dra _netjeret meret ites_
birth_names.translation: The goddess Cleopatra who is beloved of her father
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 65a

birth_names.name: Qliu pa dra _netjeret meret ites_
birth_names.translation: The goddess Cleopatra who is beloved of her father

prenomen: Iwa pa netjer nety nehem, setep en Ptah, ir Maat Ra, sekhem (ankh) en Amun

horus_names.name: Hunu
horus_names.translation: The youth
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 60b

horus_names.name: Hunu nefer
horus_names.translation: The perfect youth
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 65a

horus_names.name: Hunu nefer bener merut
horus_names.translation: The perfect youth who is sweet of love
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 61a

horus_names.name: Ka nakht iakhu setut Ra Iah
horus_names.translation: The strong bull, shining like the beams of Ra and Iah
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 53a

throne_names.name: Iwa pa netjer nety nehem, setep en Ptah, ir Maat Ra, sekhem (ankh) en Amun
throne_names.translation: The heir of the saviour god, chosen by Ptah, who brings forth the Maat of Ra, the living image of Amun
sources: Weill, _La titulature pharaonique de Ptolémée César et ses monuments de Koptos_, RecTrav 34 (1912): 81-82

birth_names.name: Ptolemys
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 60b

birth_names.name: Ptolemys, ankh djet mery Ptah Aset
birth_names.translation: Ptolemy, living forever, beloved of Ptah and Isis
sources: Weill, _La titulature pharaonique de Ptolémée César et ses monuments de Koptos_, RecTrav 34 (1912): 82 (1)

birth_names.name: Ptolemys, djedtu enef kyseres
sources: Weill, _La titulature pharaonique de Ptolémée César et ses monuments de Koptos_, RecTrav 34 (1912): 81-82

birth_names.name: Ptolemys, djedtu enef kyseres
sources: Weill, _La titulature pharaonique de Ptolémée César et ses monuments de Koptos_, RecTrav 34 (1912): 81-82

birth_names.name: Ptolemys, Kyseres ankh djet mery Ptah Aset
birth_names.translation: Ptolemy called Caesar, living forever, beloved of Ptah and Isis
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 53a

birth_names.name: Kyseres ankh djet mery Ptah Aset
birth_names.translation: Caesar, living forever, beloved of Ptah and Isis
sources: Weill, _La titulature pharaonique de Ptolémée César et ses monuments de Koptos_, RecTrav 34 (1912): 82 (1)

birth_names.name: Kyseres
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 63a

horus_names.name: Tjema wer pehty hunu bener merut heqa heqau setep en Ptah Nenu it netjeru
horus_names.translation: The sturdy-armed one with great strength, the youth sweet of love, ruler of rulers, chosen of Ptah and Nun, the father of the gods
sources: Gauthier, _Le temple de Kalabchah_, I, plates XLIII—XLVI

horus_names.name: Tjemaa wer pehty hunu bener merut
horus_names.translation: The sturdy-armed one with great strength, the youth sweet of love
sources: Gauthier, _Le temple de Kalabchah_, I, plates XLIII—XLVI

throne_names.name: Heqa heqau setep en Ptah
throne_names.translation: Ruler of rulers, chosen by Ptah
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, Text II, 184

throne_names.name: Heqa heqau setep en Ptah mery Aset
throne_names.translation: Ruler of rulers, chosen by Ptah, beloved of Isis
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, Text II, 253

horus_names.transliteration: ṯmꜢ-Ꜥ wr-pḥtꞽ ḥwnw-nfr bnr-mrwt ḥḳꜢ-ḥḳꜢw stp-n-ptḥ Nnw-ꞽt-nṯrw
horus_names.translation: The sturdy-armed one with great strength, the perfect and popular youth, ruler of rulers, chosen of Ptah and Nun, the father of the gods
sources: Lepsius, _Denkmäler aus Ägypten und Äthiopien_, IV, 74c

horus_names.name: Tjemaa wer pehty hunu nefer bener merut ka nesu sekhem khenty per duat

Ka nakht iakhw setut Ra Iah

horus_names.translation: The strong bull of the stable moon on the horizon?

horus_names.translation: The sturdy-armed one who struck the foreign lands, victorious for Egypt, ruler or rulers, chosen of Nun who loves him

horus_names.translation: The sturdy-armed one who struck the foreign lands

horus_names.translation: The perfect and popular youth

horus_names.name: Hunu nekhet itj em sekhemef
horus_names.translation: The mighty youth, his power will be stronger?

golden_horus_names.name: User renput Aa nakhtu
golden_horus_names.translation: Rich in years and great of victories

throne_names.name: Hor sa Aset mery netjeru nebu
throne_names.translation: Horus, son of Isis, beloved of the gods?
